Agent.Name: WeWork

Variable.Help: Get your webhook URL from a WeWork group robot.
Variable.Default: USE YOUR OWN WEBHOOK VALUE HERE

Variable.Help: Specify the fields which are included in the title of the notification.
Specify the fields which are included in the message body of the notification.

Agent.Script:
#!/bin/bash ############ {0} ############ # Save notification body before $CONTENT gets overwritten by markdown string BODY="$CONTENT" TITLE=$(printf '%b' "$TITLE") MESSAGE=$(printf '%b' "$MESSAGE")
# Timestamp fallback (test notifications lack it) + format [ -z "$TIMESTAMP" ] && TIMESTAMP=$(date +%s) TS=$(date -d @"${TIMESTAMP}" '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S' 2>/dev/null || date -r "${TIMESTAMP}" '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S' 2>/dev/null || echo "${TIMESTAMP}") TIMESTAMP="$TS"
case "$IMPORTANCE" in normal) EMOJI="🔵" ;; warning) EMOJI="⚠️" ;; alert) EMOJI="🚨" ;; *) EMOJI="🔵" ;; esac
# Read raw templates to know which fields are selected TITLE_TMPL=$(sed -n 's/^TITLE=//p' "$0" | head -1) MESSAGE_TMPL=$(sed -n 's/^MESSAGE=//p' "$0" | head -1) has_field() { echo "$1" | grep -q "$2"; }
# ── Title ── TITLE_LINE="" has_field "$TITLE_TMPL" '$EVENT' && TITLE_LINE="${TITLE_LINE}[${EVENT}] " has_field "$TITLE_TMPL" '$SUBJECT' && TITLE_LINE="${TITLE_LINE}${SUBJECT}" has_field "$TITLE_TMPL" '$TIMESTAMP' && TITLE_LINE="${TITLE_LINE} (${TIMESTAMP})" has_field "$TITLE_TMPL" '$DESCRIPTION' && TITLE_LINE="${TITLE_LINE} - ${DESCRIPTION}" has_field "$TITLE_TMPL" '$IMPORTANCE' && TITLE_LINE="${TITLE_LINE} [${IMPORTANCE}]" has_field "$TITLE_TMPL" '$BODY' && TITLE_LINE="${TITLE_LINE} | ${BODY}" [ -z "$TITLE_LINE" ] && TITLE_LINE="${SUBJECT}"
# ── Message body (labeled fields) ── NL=$'\n' MSG="" has_field "$MESSAGE_TMPL" '$EVENT' && MSG="${MSG}> **事件**: ${EVENT}${NL}" has_field "$MESSAGE_TMPL" '$SUBJECT' && MSG="${MSG}> **主题**: ${SUBJECT}${NL}" has_field "$MESSAGE_TMPL" '$TIMESTAMP' && MSG="${MSG}> **时间**: ${TIMESTAMP}${NL}" has_field "$MESSAGE_TMPL" '$DESCRIPTION' && MSG="${MSG}> **说明**: ${DESCRIPTION}${NL}" has_field "$MESSAGE_TMPL" '$IMPORTANCE' && MSG="${MSG}> **级别**: ${IMPORTANCE}${NL}"
# ── Build markdown ── MD="## ${EMOJI} [${IMPORTANCE}] ${APP_NAME}${NL}> ${TITLE_LINE}" if [ -n "$MSG" ]; then MD="${MD}${NL}${MSG}" fi
# Free-text content always last (before link) has_field "$MESSAGE_TMPL" '$CONTENT' && [ -n "$BODY" ] && MD="${MD}> ${BODY}${NL}"
# Link has_field "$MESSAGE_TMPL" '$LINK' && [ -n "$LINK" ] && MD="${MD}> [查看详情](${LINK})${NL}"
ESCAPED=$(printf '%s' "$MD" | sed ':a;N;$!ba;s/\\/\\\\/g;s/"/\\"/g;s/\n/\\n/g') PAYLOAD="{\"msgtype\":\"markdown_v2\",\"markdown_v2\":{\"content\":\"${ESCAPED}\"}}"
curl -s -X POST \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -d "$PAYLOAD" \ --connect-timeout 5 --max-time 10 \ "$WEBH_URL" > /dev/null 2>&1
exit 0
